# Element Plus - A Vue 3 based component library

- Element Plus is a Vue 3 based component library for developers, designers and product managers, with a set of high-quality components and rich features for building modern web applications.

## Documentation

- [附加](https://element-plus.org/component/affix)
- [警报](https://element-plus.org/component/alert)
- [锚点](https://element-plus.org/component/anchor)
- [自动完成](https://element-plus.org/component/autocomplete)
- [头像](https://element-plus.org/component/avatar)
- [后台](https://element-plus.org/component/backtop)
- [徽章](https://element-plus.org/component/badge)
- [边框](https://element-plus.org/component/border)
- [面包屑导航](https://element-plus.org/component/breadcrumb)
- [按钮](https://element-plus.org/component/button)
- [日历](https://element-plus.org/component/calendar)
- [卡](https://element-plus.org/component/card)

- [级联](https://element-plus.org/component/cascader)
